title: README operator quickstart autonomous loop improvement reason enrichment v0
problem: Ticket-354 appends improvement summary to next_recommended_action.reason when autonomous_loop_improvement_status is ok, but README Operator Quickstart does not yet document this behavior (ticket-341 parity for scratch quality).
acceptance_criteria: README notes next_recommended_action.reason improvement append when status is ok.
README notes reason unchanged when improvement status is not_run.
No CLI or export code changes.
